summary: Ship recorded the release gate. Close out the governed run or move into landing and deployment.

primary_next_actions.label: Run `/closeout`
primary_next_actions.description: Conclude the governed run and archive its canonical artifacts.
primary_next_actions.visibility_reason: Closeout is the canonical next lifecycle step after ship records the release gate.

primary_next_actions.label: Run `/land-and-deploy`
primary_next_actions.description: Merge, deploy, and verify the primary deploy surface using the ship handoff.
